features.name: Nimble Escape
features.text: Blort can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of his turns.

features.name: Cloak of Filth - Passive
features.text: Blort has advantage on Stealth checks in dirty, dark, or underground environments.

features.name: Cloak of Filth - Invisibility
features.text: Once per day, Blort can smear filth over himself and turn invisible for up to 1 hour, or until he attacks or casts a spell. If he attacks while invisible, he must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for 1d4 rounds as the cloak constricts. Blort knows about this curse and will not attack while invisible.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text:
Blort is a 7th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). He has the following spells:

Cantrips (at will): eldritch blast, minor illusion, mage hand

1st-4th level (2 4th-level spell slots): armor of shadows (at will), fly, counterspell, hold person, misty step, suggestion, black tentacles

features.name: Agonizing Blast
features.text: When Blort casts eldritch blast, he adds +3 to the damage roll.

summary.description: A paranoid, twitchy goblin shaman who speaks in a low, scratchy whisper, pausing mid-sentence to listen to things that aren't there. He was already unstable before acquiring the Cloak of Filth; now he serves as the Grimebacks' invisible spymaster. Smart enough to know the cloak's paralysis curse makes it suicidal to attack while invisible, he uses it exclusively for scouting and escape. He has studied all three stolen magic items and concluded they're all dangerously cursed. Mogrot won't listen. This bothers Blort deeply.

encounters.description: Before 2 AM, found at the gambling den wearing the Cloak of Filth, unnervingly still, watching everything. After 2 AM, works in his locked workshop (Location 5) until roughly 5 AM, then sleeps.

groups.creatures: Blort with his invisible familiar Snik, plus 8 Grimeback goblins and 2 Grimeback thugs at the gambling den
groups.treasure: Cloak of Filth (worn at all times)

groups.creatures: Blort alone in his triple-locked workshop with Snik
groups.treasure: 67 sp, a jade figurine of a rat (25 gp), 3 wands, 3 acid vials, 2 sewer poultices, a scroll of Detect Magic, 2 goblin trinkets

behavior.text: Sitting apart from the others at the gambling den, unnervingly still, watching everything. One hand rests inside the cloak.
Using Snik to invisibly nudge dice and subtly influence gambling outcomes.
Working on arcane experiments in his locked workshop after 2 AM.
If aware of intruders, goes invisible and attempts to flee to alert Mogrot. Does not attack while invisible.

loot.title: Blort's Workshop
loot.description: Blort's workshop contains an array of magical supplies and personal treasure:

table.text: Wand of grease (5 charges, DC 12 Dex save)
Wand of stink (7 charges, DC 12 Con save)
3 vials of acid, 2 sewer poultices, a scroll of Detect Magic
A journal detailing that all three magic items are dangerously cursed, plus a map of the upper level
67 sp in a clay pot under the bed and a jade rat figurine (25 gp)
